title: Assay Runner Kernel Event v0
description: Line schema for one layers/kernel.ndjson record. The stream is NDJSON: validate each non-empty line independently against this schema. Open-event metadata fields are optional so older v0 archives remain readable.

kind.description: Normalized kernel event kind such as openat, connect, exec, file_blocked, connect_blocked, or event_<id>.

value.description: Normalized path or endpoint when available.

flags.description: Linux open flags captured from an open-style syscall.

mode.description: Linux create mode argument when present.

return_value.description: Syscall return value; non-negative means success for open-style events.

access_mode.description: Derived from flags & O_ACCMODE for open-style events.

operation_flags.description: Derived operation hints from open flags. These are open-intent hints, not fd-level byte evidence.

status.description: Derived from return_value for open-style events.
